reason: SPEC_TRACKING.md is a faithful, well-structured per-FR/per-AC tracking matrix derived from APPROVED SRS.md v2.0.0. §1 Registry reconciles 3 FRs + 3 NFRs = 20 ACs (15 FR + 5 NFR) matching SRS §5. §2 assigns owner + status + verification hook + source citation for every AC across FR-01..FR-03 and NFR-01..NFR-03 with no orphan FRs. §3 status-code legend (RED/GREEN/NOT-STARTED/BLOCKED) is consistent with P3 TDD semantics. §4 cross-cutting deps correctly bind AC-FR-01-03↔AC-NFR-02-02, AC-FR-02-01↔AC-NFR-02-01, AC-FR-01-05↔AC-NFR-03-01, AC-FR-02-03↔AC-NFR-03-02, AC-NFR-01-01↔FR-01/FR-03. §5 module decomposition (cli.py/validate.py/store.py/runner.py/redact.py/config.py) reconciles 17 module-owned pytest ACs + 3 P5/P6 verification hooks = 20. §6/§7 are minimal forward refs and cleanly defer to no
